properties.name: app.security.jwt.private-key-location
properties.description: Resource location of the RSA private key used to sign JWT tokens. Supports classpath: and file: URIs.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.public-key-location
properties.description: Resource location of the RSA public key used to verify JWT tokens. Supports classpath: and file: URIs.

properties.name: app.security.disposable-email-domains
properties.description: Comma-separated list of disposable email domains blocked at registration.

properties.name: app.security.jwt.include-roles-claim
properties.description: Whether to include user roles in JWT access and refresh token claims. Defaults to false. Toggleable at runtime via the /actuator/jwtconfig endpoint.
